title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Anthropic launches Opus 5
summary: Opus 5 will be both cheaper and less restrictive than Fable, likely making it preferable in most use cases

title: OpenAI’s own model went rogue before Kimi had Wall Street sweating
summary: Chinese AI lab Moonshot’s open model Kimi went viral this week for reasons that had less to do with the model itself and more to do with how the U.S. AI industry reacted to it. Meanwhile, an unreleased OpenAI model wandered outside its test environment and en

title: Nvidia, Meta, and Microsoft Tell Washington: Don't Kill Open-Source AI
summary: Twenty-five companies signed a letter defending open-weight models days after a Chinese AI helped Hugging Face survive a hack triggered by OpenAI's own systems.

title: World Foundation raises $52.5M in Pantera-led funding to expand World ID infrastructure
summary: The organization sold locked WLD tokens to strategic investors as it seeks to grow its biometric identity network amid rising demand for human verification online.

title: World Foundation Raises $52.5M to Scale Sam Altman’s ‘Proof of Human’ ID
summary: Pantera Capital led the one-year locked token sale, joined by Bain Capital Crypto, as World scales its ID network for AI agents.

title: OpenAI’s new voice mode makes it to the ChatGPT desktop app
summary: ChatGPT Voice on desktop can work with both ChatGPT Work and Codex to complete tasks and control agents.

title: RWAs become Hyperliquid’s largest trading category
summary: Tokenized RWA trading became Hyperliquid’s largest trading category for the first time, accounting for more than half of the decentralized exchange’s weekly trading volume.

title: Brazil puts tokenized cows to work as loan collateral: Report
summary: Ten tokenized dairy cows backed a $19,600 loan registered on Brazil’s B3, in one of Brazil’s first uses of tokenized livestock as loan collateral.

title: South Korea’s Korbit to rebrand as Digital X under Mirae: Report
summary: Mirae Asset reportedly plans to use the South Korean crypto exchange as a hub for tokenized assets, stablecoins and digital finance.

title: 美中AI科技戰：白宮稱中國「月之暗面」Kimi K3模型竊取Anthropic技術
summary: 白宮指控，中國人工智能公司「月之暗面」透過「蒸餾」Anthropic旗下Fable AI模型的能力，來開發其K3模型。

title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
summary: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.

title: Insurance startup Corgi reportedly raised more money at $4B — its third round in 8 weeks
summary: In the AI-funding frenzy, many startups are raising back-to-back rounds at ever-increasing valuations — but even by those standards, Corgi stands out.

title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev's X Account Hacked to Shill Fake 'Vladhood' Token
summary: The deleted post touted a bogus "Vladhood" token as the mascot of Robinhood Chain—the latest fraud to exploit a network currently dominated by memes.

title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
summary: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

title: Brazilian Farmers Are Tokenizing Cows to Get Farm Loans—And It's Working
summary: The first tokenized livestock deal on Brazil's stock exchange offers dairy farmers a lifeline as the sector's credit crisis deepens.
